channel.title: NAR González, L García-Otero, C Pons-Duran, E Marbán-Castro, A Goncé, E Llurba, MDM Gil, MÁ Rodríguez-Zambrano, H Chen, M Ramírez, A Bardají, C Menendez | PlatCOVID

item.title: Hydroxychloroquine efficacy and safety in preventing SARS-CoV-2 infection and COVID-19 disease severity during pregnancy (COVID-Preg): a structured summary of a study protocol for a randomised placebo controlled trial.
